{{Quote|DROIDS DON'T BRAG. THEY INFORM.|translated=1|Sneaker|<ref name="Tempest" />}}
'''Sneaker''' was an [[R9-series astromech droid|R9 unit]] belonging to [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

Jaina acquired Sneaker to replace [[Sneaky]], who was destroyed on [[Tenupe]]. Sneaker possessed the typical R9 series tendency toward excessive caution–when trying to identify a freighter as the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], he didn't consider a 94% data correlation in the engine signature to be a "sure" match. Sneaker was able to discover that the Falcon was heading towards the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].

Sneaker was destroyed when Ducha [[Galney (Ducha of Terephon)|Galney]] ordered her [[Miy'til starfighter|Miy'tils]] to destroy Jaina and her partner [[Zekk]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sneaker inexplicably reappears in ''Inferno'', apparently following destruction in ''Tempest'', with no explanation as to why.<ref name="Inferno" /> Later in ''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]'' novel, Jaina has again an R9 unit named Sneaky. How the two are linked, or even if they are at all, is never disclosed.<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Invincible">''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''</ref>
